idea-plugin.name: Producer MCP
idea-plugin.description:
AI Music Generation with Producer/Riffusion (FUZZ) via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

This plugin helps you set up the MCP Producer server with JetBrains AI Assistant. Once configured, AI Assistant can generate music, create covers, extend songs, and more — all powered by Ace Data Cloud.

Features

  • 18 AI Tools — Generate, extend, cover, remix, and separate music
  • Easy Setup — One-click copy MCP configuration for AI Assistant
  • Dual Mode — STDIO (local) and HTTP (remote) server support
  • Token Management — Store API token securely in IDE settings

Available Tools

  • Generate — Create music from text prompts
  • Custom — Generate with custom lyrics, title, and style
  • Extend — Extend songs from a timestamp
  • Cover — Create covers in different styles
  • Variation — Create variations of songs
  • Swap — Swap vocals or instrumentals between songs
  • Stems — Separate into vocal and instrument tracks
  • Lyrics — Generate structured lyrics

Quick Start

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Open Settings → Tools → Producer MCP
  3. Enter your Ace Data Cloud API token
  4. Click Copy Config and paste into Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP

Requires uv (Python package runner) for STDIO mode, or use HTTP mode for zero-install remote access.

action.description: Copy STDIO MCP configuration for AI Assistant
Copy HTTP MCP configuration for AI Assistant

idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • MCP server integration with JetBrains AI Assistant
  • STDIO and HTTP transport modes
  • Settings UI for API token management
  • One-click MCP config copy
